positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a vibrant cosmic nebula cloud encompassing a single, stylized lunar crescent and a cluster of abstracted, flowing stars. The composition should be centered and suitable for apparel printing, featuring clean, crisp silhouettes and high contrast between deep indigo and brilliant nebula colors (teal, violet, sapphire). The design should evoke a sense of wonder and infinite space, using graphic, vector-art quality lines and shapes, with a slightly retro-futuristic, vaporwave aesthetic. Focus on strong visual impact and clear separation of colors for printing.
negative: blurry, noisy, grainy, text, words, logo, signature, watermarks, low contrast, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, cartoon, photo, realistic, 3d render
